name: create-luke-article
description: Write a LinkedIn post or a long-form blog article in Luke Rhodes' authentic voice (Diolog CTO and co-founder), from a topic, a topic-context document, and Luke's personal point of view. Produces a ready-to-publish, engagement-optimised, compliance-aware article that sounds like Luke (calm, direct, technically fluent, quietly witty, no em dashes, no AI clichés) plus an on-brand Diolog graphic concept and image prompt. Bundles a self-contained voice spec (synthesised from Luke's profiles and raw writing samples), a distilled 2024–2025 LinkedIn engagement reference, Diolog's lead-designer graphic-concepting approach, and a deterministic voice-lint script that hard-fails on em dashes and AI-tell phrases.
